text: Check the staging health endpoint and then pull the last 24 hours of error logs
Staging is healthy. Pulling error logs next.

ts=2026-05-19T03:11:08Z svc=billing-api req_id=8c12 err=DeadlineExceeded msg=upstream RPC to ledger-svc exceeded the 1500ms deadline; retry budget 0/2 used; tail latency on this route has been climbing since 02:50Z when the ledger-svc canary at 25% began consuming a noticeably larger fraction of the per-pod cpu quota
ts=2026-05-19T03:14:02Z svc=billing-api req_id=8c44 err=DeadlineExceeded msg=upstream RPC to ledger-svc exceeded the 1500ms deadline; retry budget 1/2 used; same canary correlation as 03:11:08
ts=2026-05-19T03:18:51Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d09 err=DeadlineExceeded msg=upstream RPC to ledger-svc exceeded the 1500ms deadline; retry budget 2/2 used; circuit breaker opened on this route for 30s
ts=2026-05-19T03:19:21Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d10 err=CircuitBreakerOpen msg=circuit breaker still open; failing fast without RPC attempt
ts=2026-05-19T03:19:51Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d11 err=CircuitBreakerOpen msg=circuit breaker still open; failing fast without RPC attempt
ts=2026-05-19T03:20:21Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d12 err=CircuitBreakerHalfOpen msg=circuit breaker half-open; probing with one request
ts=2026-05-19T03:20:21Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d12 err=DeadlineExceeded msg=probe RPC failed; circuit reopens for another 60s
ts=2026-05-19T03:21:54Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d33 err=ConfigDrift msg=expected ledger-svc-canary weight=0.25 but observed 0.71; runtime config drift detected mid-incident; manual rollback recommended
ts=2026-05-19T03:23:09Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d40 err=ConfigDrift msg=second config drift sample confirms canary weight 0.71; rolling back to baseline
ts=2026-05-19T03:26:15Z svc=billing-api req_id=8d51 err=RecoverySettle msg=baseline restored; deadline-exceeded rate dropped from 18.4%/min back to 0.1%/min over a two-minute window
Ten error events found. The pattern is ledger-svc canary weight drift from 25% to 71% causing deadline-exceeded errors that opened the circuit breaker.
Now show me the current canary weight for ledger-svc
Canary weight is back to 0.25 — matches the post-rollback recovery line in the logs.
File a postmortem ticket linking the rollback and the original drift

tickets.create(project='SRE', type='postmortem', title='ledger-svc canary weight drift 03:11Z–03:26Z', body='Canary weight drifted to 0.71 during a routine rollout. Deadline-exceeded errors triggered the circuit breaker; rollback to 0.25 restored steady-state. Action items: (1) add a guardrail on canary weight ratio in deploy.canary_weight, (2) add an alert at >0.5 weight when not in a controlled experiment, (3) shorten circuit breaker open window from 60s to 20s for billing-api → ledger-svc.')
